title: Modern Glass Doors
description: Adds glass variants of vanilla doors to spice up your builds!
body:
# Modern Glass Doors

Tired of normal, boring doors without glass in them? Well, look no further! Modern Glass Doors aims to spice up your world with more modern-looking, glassy doors.

To add glass to a door, simply craft a normal door together with a glass pane or right click a placed door with a glass pane.

Check the Gallery for a preview!

## Credits

Many thanks to **RetroBarbare** for the original idea and textures and to **Kyrptonaught** for the original implementation.

Many thanks also go out to our other contributors, which you can see in game on the mod's page from the Mod Menu mod.
